calendar.matters:
Petn. For Determination Of Validity Of Trust Provisions
Off Calendar Oct-09-2007 Granted Per Written Order

Petn. For Determination Of Validity Of Trust Provisions
Off Calendar Sep-25-2007 Continued To Oct-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: David Miller and Peter Truman appearing for and with petitioner Luis Galvez. Jeffrey Eisen appearing by Court Call for Amnesty Internation. Thomas Miller appearing by Court Call for Global Exchange. The Court considered the May 2006 and February 2007 holographic instruments as amendments to the trust. All of the decedent's assets are trust assets. The Court has received a letter from the sister inquiring about the jewelry. Mr. Galvez stated his understanding of Mrs. Baird's wishes. David Miller read into the record some of Mrs. Baird's notes. Court is not going to make any order on the jewelry. The trustee has discrection to distribute to the beneficiaries. He purposed to distribute zero percent to the radio station. Court questioned if the other person named in the amendment is to serve as co-trustee. David Miller has received a letter from John Gable stating that he will act if the Court will name him. Mr. Eisen wanted to make sure Mr. Gable joined in the proposed distribution plan if he is to accept the appointment as co-trustee. Court will give Mr. Gable until 10/5 to confirm the terms of the petition or a file a declination. Matter is continued to 10/9. David Miller will submit a revised order. Both Mr. Eisen and Thomas Miller requested for a copy of the revised order and David Miller will send them copies. If appearance is required on 10/9 and request to appear by phone is made, Court will set the hearing at 11am.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR# 5229. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Lewis.

Petn. For Determination Of Validity Of Trust Provisions
Off Calendar Sep-04-2007 Continued To Sep-25-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
